must_do.full_text:
🇨🇳 CHINA DEBUTS ITS BIGGEST AI MODEL WITHOUT NVIDIA CHIPS

China’s food-delivery giant Meituan just released LongCat 2.0, a 1.6 TRILLION-parameter AI model and reportedly the biggest model trained on local Chinese chips.

The model used 50,000 domestic chips after US export https://t.co/MOtChRSa3a
must_do.summary: 美团发布LongCat 2.0，1.6万亿参数AI模型，采用5万块国产芯片训练，是中国最大的非NVIDIA芯片AI模型。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：中国首次突破NVIDIA依赖
反常识：食品配送公司做AI模型
有明确数字：1.6万亿参数、5万块芯片
angles: 中国终于造出最大AI模型，不用NVIDIA芯片
美团5万块国产芯片训练1.6万亿参数模型
食品配送巨头秘密研发AI，打破芯片封锁

must_do.full_text:
After 18 months of writing, coding, and experimenting, Build a Reasoning Model (From Scratch) is 
finally out!

My first copies just arrived! 📚

440 full-color pages. Inference scaling, reinforcement learning, and distillation from scratch. https://t.co/647ksI7sLc
must_do.summary: Sebastian Raschka新书《Build a Reasoning Model From Scratch》正式出版，440页全彩，涵盖推理扩展、强化学习、蒸馏。
angles: 18个月打磨：从零构建推理模型的完整指南
440页全彩秘籍：推理扩展、强化学习、蒸馏一本通
Sebastian Raschka新作首发：AI推理模型终极教科书

must_do.full_text:
Hermes Agent now reads the web up to 60x faster and 49x cheaper.

Scraping backends pass clean content straight to the agent without redundant processing steps; large pages are saved locally and paged on demand so you get the same quality at a fraction of the time and cost. https://t.co/EwJThNmCXE

additional_media_info.title: Web Scraping Now Faster and Cheaper

must_do.summary: Nous Research发布Hermes Agent，网页阅读速度提升60倍、成本降低49倍。
angles: Hermes Agent突破：网页阅读快60倍、便宜49倍

must_do.full_text:
Introducing Nano Banana 2 Lite 🍌 and Gemini Omni Flash 🔮, our new generative media models in the Gemini API and AI Studio!

Nano Banana 2 Lite is extremely fast (<4s image) & cheap ($0.034 / 1K image).

Omni Flash is SOTA at video editing at $0.10 / sec, same as Veo 3.1 Fast! https://t.co/qDxRpqpX5E
must_do.summary: Google推出Nano Banana 2 Lite和Gemini Omni Flash两款生成媒体模型。Nano Banana 2 Lite图像生成<4秒、$0.034/1K张；Omni Flash视频编辑SOTA水平、$0.10/秒。
angles: Google新模型Nano Banana 2 Lite：4秒出图仅需$0.034
Gemini Omni Flash视频编辑SOTA：与Veo 3.1价格相同
Google生成媒体新品发布：性能与成本的完美平衡

must_do.full_text: “Loop engineering” is a hot buzzphrase after mentions of it by Boris Cherny (Claude Code’s creator) and Peter Steinberger (OpenClaw's creator) went viral on social media. Loops are now a key part of how we get AI agents to iterate at length to build software. In this letter, I’d https://t.co/bhuRw8lrFC
must_do.summary: Andrew Ng分析"Loop engineering"热潮：Boris Cherny（Claude Code创建者）和Peter Steinberger（OpenClaw创建者）的观点引发关注，循环工程成为AI智能体迭代构建软件的关键。
angles: Loop Engineering爆火：Andrew Ng解读AI智能体的新范式
Claude Code vs OpenClaw：谁定义了AI迭代构建的未来
从单次推理到循环工程：AI智能体的进化论

must_do.full_text:
Introducing Claude Science, a new app designed with every stage of research in mind. 

Artifacts traced to their code, environments managed on demand, and 60+ optional scientific databases that you can connect.

Available now in beta. https://t.co/HKhLknxLJO
must_do.summary: Anthropic推出Claude Science应用，专为科研设计，支持60+科学数据库接入、代码追溯、环境管理。2.3万赞，官方发布，垂直应用创新。

AI终于懂科研了，代码追溯+环境管理
研究员的新武器：Claude Science深度体验

must_do.full_text:
Introducing Claude Sonnet 5, our most agentic Sonnet yet.

It makes plans, uses tools like browsers and terminals, and runs autonomously at a level that just a few months ago required larger and more expensive models. https://t.co/UKK8G7ww5h
must_do.summary: Anthropic发布Claude Sonnet 5，具备规划、工具使用和自主运行能力，性能达到数月前需要更大更贵模型的水平。3.2万赞，官方发布，信息差强。

数月前需要GPT-4的能力，现在Sonnet 5搞定
自主规划+工具调用，Sonnet 5的三大升级

must_do.full_text:
Claude Sonnet 5 is here.

Top-tier performance on coding and tool use at Sonnet pricing, with a 1M context window.

It's the new default in Claude Code for Pro users, and available everywhere on the Claude Platform, including the API and Managed Agents.
must_do.summary: Anthropic发布Claude Sonnet 5，提供顶级编码性能、100万token上下文窗口，已在Claude Code和API平台上线。

编码神器升级：Sonnet 5性能突破

Claude Desktop is now available on Linux (Ubuntu and Debian) in beta.

Introducing Short Video Overviews in NotebookLM! Turn your most complex sources into 60-second, vertical videos that deep dive into any concept.

We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind of AI progress: how well agents can navigate messy biological data, choose the right analysis path, and make judgment calls that real computational research depends on.

We'll begin restoring access tomorrow, and will share an update soon.

If you want to add a navigation trail to your own chat app, the new MessageScroller component has the hooks you need out of the box. Look for:

const { currentAnchorId, visibleMessageIds } = useMessageScrollerVisibility()

If you’re interested, feel free to read it. Please note that this is just one person’s perspective.
